detailed_description: This video visually demonstrates the process of hair growth, starting from a sparse scalp with minimal hair follicles and progressively showing an increase in hair density and length. The animation depicts individual hairs emerging from the skin's surface and multiplying to create a full, healthy head of hair. It effectively communicates a transformation from thin to thick hair, likely illustrating the efficacy of a hair growth product or treatment at a microscopic level.

segments.why_kept: This entire segment is kept as the Semantic Core because it comprehensively illustrates the primary action and transformation of hair growth, which is the core message of the video. It depicts the 'process' (hairs growing) and the 'reveal/result' (a denser coverage of hair on the scalp) without any extraneous footage or setup/calibration. The animation starts precisely with the action and ends when the transformation is complete.
